description: PVGIS (Photovoltaic Geographical Information System) CLI — the European Commission JRC's solar-radiation and PV-performance service from your terminal. Estimates monthly and hourly PV production, downloads Typical Meteorological Year (TMY) data, fetches horizon profiles, and finds optimal tilt for any point on Earth covered by PVGIS-SARAH3, PVGIS-NSRDB, or PVGIS-ERA5.

tools.name: horizon_profile
tools.description: Terrain horizon profile (printhorizon) for a site. Returns the horizon height in degrees at 49 azimuth points from -180 to 180 (step 7.5 degrees), derived from the SRTM DEM. Also returns the sun path at winter and summer solstices for solar-availability analysis. Required: lat, lon. Optional: outputformat.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

params.name: outputformat
params.description: Response format. Forced to 'json'.

tools.name: production_hourly
tools.description: Hourly PV production time series (seriescalc) for a fixed-mount system. Returns one row per hour over the requested year range with power P (W), in-plane irradiance G(i), sun height, air temperature, wind speed. Typical response is 8760 rows per year. Required: lat, lon. Optional: pvcalculation, pnom, system-loss (plus 9 more).

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

params.name: pvcalculation
params.description: Compute PV production (1) or just radiation/weather (0). CLI defaults to 1.

params.name: pnom
params.description: Nominal peak power in kWp. Required when --pvcalculation=1.

params.name: system-loss
params.description: Total system losses in percent.

params.name: tilt
params.description: Surface tilt in degrees.

params.name: azimuth
params.description: Surface azimuth (PVGIS convention).

params.name: technology
params.description: Module technology: crystSi, CIS, CdTe, Unknown.

params.name: mounting
params.description: Mounting type: free, building.

params.name: use-horizon
params.description: Use terrain horizon. 1 = yes, 0 = no.

params.name: startyear
params.description: First year of the time series.

params.name: endyear
params.description: Last year of the time series.

params.name: raddatabase
params.description: Force a radiation database.

params.name: outputformat
params.description: Response format. Forced to 'json'.

tools.name: production_monthly
tools.description: Monthly and annual PV production (PVcalc) for a fixed-mount system. Returns monthly energy E_m, daily energy E_d, and in-plane irradiation H(i)_m, plus yearly totals E_y. Accounts for module technology, system losses, and optional terrain horizon. Required: lat, lon, pnom, system-loss. Optional: tilt, azimuth, technology (plus 4 more).

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (positive north).

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (positive east).

params.name: pnom
params.description: Nominal system peak power in kWp.

params.name: system-loss
params.description: Total system losses in percent (cables, inverter, soiling, mismatch). Typical 10-15.

params.name: tilt
params.description: Surface tilt in degrees (0-90). Default 0.

params.name: azimuth
params.description: Surface azimuth (PVGIS convention: 0 = south, -90 = east, 90 = west).

params.name: technology
params.description: Module technology: crystSi (default), CIS, CdTe, Unknown.

params.name: mounting
params.description: Mounting type: free (free-standing, default), building (BIPV).

params.name: use-horizon
params.description: Use the DEM-derived terrain horizon profile. 1 = yes (default), 0 = no.

params.name: raddatabase
params.description: Force a radiation database: PVGIS-SARAH3, PVGIS-NSRDB, PVGIS-ERA5.

params.name: outputformat
params.description: Response format. Forced to 'json' by the CLI.

tools.name: radiation_monthly
tools.description: Monthly solar radiation (MRcalc) for a site. Returns 12 monthly values on the horizontal plane, the requested tilt, and/or the locally optimal tilt, plus monthly average air temperature. Uses PVGIS-SARAH3 for Europe/Africa/Asia, PVGIS-NSRDB for the Americas, PVGIS-ERA5 elsewhere. Required: lat, lon. Optional: use-horizon, horizontal, tilted (plus 8 more).

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (positive north). PVGIS covers roughly -65 to +65.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (positive east). PVGIS covers -180 to +180.

params.name: use-horizon
params.description: Use the DEM-derived terrain horizon profile. 1 = yes (default), 0 = no.

params.name: horizontal
params.description: Include monthly global horizontal irradiation in the output. 1 = yes.

params.name: tilted
params.description: Include monthly irradiation on the user-selected tilt/azimuth plane. 1 = yes.

params.name: tilt
params.description: Surface tilt in degrees from horizontal (0-90). Used when --tilted is set.

params.name: azimuth
params.description: Surface azimuth (PVGIS convention: 0 = south, -90 = east, 90 = west).

params.name: optimal
params.description: Include monthly irradiation on the locally optimal tilt. 1 = yes.

params.name: avg-temp
params.description: Include monthly average 2m air temperature. 1 = yes.

params.name: raddatabase
params.description: Force a radiation database: PVGIS-SARAH3, PVGIS-NSRDB, PVGIS-ERA5. Default lets PVGIS choose by region.

params.name: startyear
params.description: First year of the averaging window. Default is the earliest available.

params.name: endyear
params.description: Last year of the averaging window. Default is the latest available.

params.name: outputformat
params.description: Response format. Forced to 'json' by the CLI.

tools.name: weather_tmy
tools.description: Typical Meteorological Year for a site. Returns 8760 hourly rows with air temperature T2m, relative humidity, global horizontal irradiance G(h), beam normal Gb(n), diffuse Gd(h), longwave IR(h), wind speed WS10m, wind direction WD10m, surface pressure SP. Constructed from the long-term record so it represents climate, not a specific year. Required: lat, lon. Optional: startyear, endyear, outputformat.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

params.name: startyear
params.description: First year of source data used to build the TMY (default: earliest available).

params.name: endyear
params.description: Last year of source data (default: latest available).

params.name: outputformat
params.description: Response format. Forced to 'json'.
